content:
# Shuram Isotope Excursion

**Summary**: A major negative carbon isotope excursion in the Ediacaran.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-malik|Malik, 2024]] investigated potential shuram-isotope-excursion signatures in the Dhaiqa Formation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-malik|Malik, 2024]] A global phenomenon used to identify specific geological time windows in the Ediacaran.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-malik|Malik, 2024]] measured via \delta13Ccarb analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The only potential candidate location for the SIE to have occurred in our section is the transgressive interval T2 starting at 285m log elevation. ([[2024-malik|Malik, 2024, p. 74]])
